headline: CoStar Group (CSGP) is Among the Best Low-Risk High-Reward Stocks
summary: CoStar Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:CSGP) secures a spot on our list of the best low-risk high-reward stocks. As of April 10, 2026, 76% of covering analysts maintain bullish ratings on CoStar Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:CSGP), with the $60 consensus price target implying roughly 60% upside. There have been a number of cuts to CoStar’s price target in […]

headline: CoStar - Sao Paulo hotel performance jumped for Design Week; March 2026 occupancy rose 13% to 67.8% while ADR increased 7.4% to BRL871.48, with peak performance on March 11
